name: Onion Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the butter and sugar. Mix in the cornmeal, salt, and flour until well combined to form a crumbly texture.
2. Gradually add eggs one at a time, mixing after each addition until the dough comes together.
3. Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate until firm, about 30 minutes.
4. Roll out the chilled dough and press it into tart pans, ensuring the bottom and up the sides are evenly covered.
5. In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat. Add the diced onions and cook, stirring occasionally, for 6-8 minutes until very soft without browning.
6. Remove from heat and let cool completely.
7. In a bowl, whisk together eggs, sour cream, half and half, kosher salt, white pepper, sun-dried tomatoes, and mozzarella cheese until well combined.
8. Arrange the cooled onions in the tart pans.
9. Pour the egg mixture over the onions.
10. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 30-35 minutes, or until set.
11. Remove from oven and let rest for 15-30 minutes before cutting.
12. Garnish with sun-dried tomatoes and mozzarella cheese.
13. Serve warm or at room temperature.
